name: Night Driver
short_description: Night Driver - 3D car game in which you will drive at night through dark alleys!
detailed_description:
Night Driver - 3D car game in which you will drive at night through dark alleys!

Get behind the wheel of a car and get to the finish line as quickly as possible before the timer reaches zero, otherwise you will have to start all over again. Show dexterity and skill in driving vehicles to successfully overcome all obstacles on your way!

Be careful and avoid collisions with explosive objects so as not to destroy your car. Show everyone your driving skills and become the best night driver!
about_the_game:

Be careful and avoid collisions with explosive objects so as not to destroy your car. Show everyone your driving skills and become the best night driver!
